description: Configure cost allocation rules in iDempiere for seasonal campaigns. Create two marketing campaigns: 'Spring Promotion 2025' (Search Key: 'SPRING2025') and 'Summer Blowout 2025' (Search Key: 'SUMMER2025'). Set up a GL Distribution named 'Marketing Split 2025' (Description: 'Allocation for 2025 seasonal campaigns') that allocates 60% of costs to the Spring Promotion 2025 campaign and 40% to the Summer Blowout 2025 campaign.
